'''Seedar Bomu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] and a member of the [[Bomu Clan]].

==Biography==
Seedar worked for [[Vago Gejalli Thokka|Vago]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and the [[Anjiliac]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]], along with a number of his clan during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

He and another Bomu [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], [[Narnee Bomu]], was hired by Vago to find a treacherous partner of Popara who had stolen one hundred thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. Vago, not completely trusting the Bomus, put tracker devices in their [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. The Bomus [[Death/Legends|killed]] the buyer of the spice with a sudden explosion, although it is unclear if they managed to recover the spice—some believe that Vago had to send [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] with the same prey after the Bomus' failure.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
